name: Reuben Roller Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 large sheet of Hye Roller brand cracker bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the bread to room temperature.
2. Spread cream cheese evenly over one side of the bread.
3. Layer the ingredients in order (corned beef, pastrami, Swiss cheese slices, mustard, Thousand island salad dressing, and sauerkraut) on top of the cream cheese, leaving about 4 inches at one end covered with cream cheese only.
4. Beginning at the end covered with filling, roll the bread tightly as possible in a jelly-roll fashion toward the other end covered with cream cheese only.
5. The final roll should be sealed by the layer of cream cheese alone. Wrap the sandwich tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerate for later use, or slice and serve immediately. Best when used within 48 hours.
6. To serve: Remove the plastic wrap and slice the sandwich into 12 pieces. Each serving consists of three sandwich rounds.
